name: pollination-handlers

metadata.name: pollination-handlers
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3
metadata.summary: Handlers to process Pollination recipes inputs and outputs.

documentation:
# handlers-python
Handlers to process inputs and outputs of Pollination recipes.

An input handler takes an input provided by user and convert it to the object that is
needed by the recipe input.

An output handler takes the output of a recipe and post-process it before visualizing it
inside the user interface.

modules.name: pollination_handlers
documentation: Python handlers for Pollination plugins.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options
documentation: Handlers to convert various boolean options to boolean flag strings.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.filter_des_days_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the filter_des_days flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * filter-des-days
    * all-des-days

Returns:
    str -- filter_des_days flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.skip_overture_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the skip_overture flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * skip-overture
    * overture

Returns:
    str -- skip_overture flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.glare_control_devices_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the glare_control_devices flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * glare-control
    * no-glare-control

Returns:
    str -- glare_control_devices flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.use_multiplier_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the use_multiplier flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * multiplier
    * full-geometry

Returns:
    str -- use_multiplier flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.is_residential_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the is_residential flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * residential
    * nonresidential

Returns:
    str -- is_residential flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.write_set_map_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the write_set_map flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * write-op-map
    * write-set-map

Returns:
    str -- write_set_map flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.sky_view_metric_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the sky view metric flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * sky-exposure
    * sky-view

Returns:
    str -- sky view metric flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.cloudy_bool_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the uniform/cloudy flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * cloudy
    * uniform

Returns:
    str -- sky view uniform/cloudy flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.visible_vs_solar_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the visible vs solar flag.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * visible
    * solar

Returns:
    str -- visible vs solar flag text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.bool_options.bldg_lighting_to_str
documentation:
Translate a boolean to the lighting-method flag of Appendix G simulations.

Args:
    value: Either a boolean or one of two text strings.

    * building
    * space

Returns:
    str -- building vs space flag text.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.postprocess
documentation: Handlers for post-processing options.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.postprocess.grid_metrics
documentation:
Validate the file for custom grid metrics.

Args:
    gm_obj: An object with custom grid metrics. This can be either a
        JSON file, a string, or a list of grid metrics.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a the custom grid metrics file.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.ddy
documentation: Handlers for ddy file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.ddy.ddy_handler
documentation:
Translate a DDY object to a ddy file.

Args:
    ddy_obj: Either a DDY python object or the path to a ddy or an epw file.
        In case the ddy_obj is a path to ddy file it will be returned as is.
        For epw files, a heating and cooling design day will be approximated
        from statistical analysis of the EPW data.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a ddy file.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.runperiod
documentation: Handlers to check ladybug analysis period inputs.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.runperiod.run_period_to_str
documentation:
Translate an AnalysisPeriod into a string.

Args:
    value: Either an AnalysisPeriod object or a string representation
        of an AnalysisPeriod.

Returns:
    str -- string version of the run period.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.pit
documentation: Handlers to interpret point-in-time metrics to correct sting inputs.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.pit.point_in_time_metric_to_str
documentation:
Translate a string of any acceptable metric inputs to a recipe input.

Args:
    value: Either an integer or text to indicate the following.

    * 0 = illuminance
    * 1 = irradiance
    * 2 = luminance
    * 3 = radiance

Returns:
    str -- point in time recipe text.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.helper.bool_option_to_str
documentation: Convert a boolean option to a string given a list of acceptable values.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.helper.get_tempfile
documentation: Get full path to a temporary file with extension.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.helper.get_tempfolder
documentation: Get full path to a temporary folder with extension.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.helper.write_values_to_csv
documentation: Write a list of values to a CSV.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.helper.write_sch_values_to_csv
documentation: Write a list of fractional values to a discrete 0/1 CSV.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.north
documentation: Handlers to convert north vectors to angles.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.north.north_vector_to_angle
documentation:
Translate a north vector into a north angle in degrees.

Args:
    value: Either a Vector2D for the north direction or a number between
        -360 and 360 for the counterclockwise difference between the North
        and the positive Y-axis in degrees.

Returns:
    float -- north angle in degrees.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.data
documentation: Handlers to convert inputs that accept ladybug data collections.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.data.value_or_data_to_str
documentation:
Translate a single numerical value or data collection into a string.

Args:
    value: Either a single numerical value or a data collection.

Returns:
    str -- string version of the number or JSON array string of data
        collection values.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.data.value_or_data_to_file
documentation:
Translate a single numerical value or data collection into a file.

Args:
    value: Either a single numerical value or a data collection.
    file_name: Name for the file. If None, a unique one will be generated.

Returns:
    file -- a file containing the input value with one row per value.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.data.value_or_data_to_air_speed_file
documentation: Translate a single numerical value or data collection into an air_speed.csv file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.data.value_or_data_to_met_file
documentation: Translate a single numerical value or data collection into a met.csv file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.data.value_or_data_to_clo_file
documentation: Translate a single numerical value or data collection into a clo.csv file.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model
documentation: Handlers for honeybee and dragonfly models.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_to_json
documentation:
Translate a Honeybee model to a HBJSON file.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Honeybee model or the path to the HBJSON file.
        In case the model_obj is a path, it will be returned as is. For a
        Model object, it will be saved to a HBJSON file in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_to_json_room_check
documentation:
Translate a Honeybee model to HBJSON with checks for Rooms.

If no Rooms are found in the model, a ValueError will be raised with an
explicit error message.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Honeybee model or the path to the HBJSON file.
        In case the model_obj is a path, it will be returned as is. For a
        Model object, it will be saved to a HBJSON file in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_to_json_hvac_check
documentation:
Translate a Honeybee model to HBJSON with checks for Rooms with HVAC.

If no Rooms with HVAC are found in the model, a ValueError will be
raised with an explicit error message.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Honeybee model or the path to the HBJSON file.
        In case the model_obj is a path, it will be returned as is. For a
        Model object, it will be saved to a HBJSON file in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_to_json_grid_check
documentation:
Translate a Honeybee model to HBJSON and perform a check for SensorGrids.

If no SensorGrids are found in the model, a ValueError will be raised with
an explicit error message. Note that this check will be bypassed if a
HBJSON/HBpkl file is connected or if the path to a Radiance Folder.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Honeybee model or the path to the Honeybee model.
        Paths can either be to a HBJSON/HBpkl file or to a Honeybee Radiance
        folder that serves as direct input for a Radiance recipe.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_to_json_grid_room_check
documentation:
Translate a Honeybee model to HBJSON with checks for Rooms and SensorGrids.

If no Rooms or SensorGrids are found in the model, a ValueError will be
raised with an explicit error message.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Honeybee model or the path to the HBJSON file.
        In case the model_obj is a path, it will be returned as is. For a
        Model object, it will be saved to a HBJSON file in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_to_json_view_check
documentation:
Translate a Honeybee model to HBJSON and perform a check for Views.

If no Views are found in the model, a ValueError will be raised with
an explicit error message. Note that this check will be bypassed if a
HBJSON/HBpkl file is connected or if the path to a Radiance Folder.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Honeybee model or the path to the HBJSON file.
        Paths can either be to a HBJSON/HBpkl file or to a Honeybee Radiance
        folder that serves as direct input for a Radiance recipe.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model.model_dragonfly_to_json
documentation:
Translate a Dragonfly model to a DFJSON file.

Args:
    model_obj: Either a Dragonfly model or the path to the DFJSON file.
        In case the model_obj is a path, it will be returned as is.  For a
        Model object, it will be saved to a DFJSON file in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to DFJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.model._process_model_rad_folder
documentation: Zip a Radiance folder for input to a Radiance recipe.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.schedule
documentation: Handlers to convert inputs that accept ladybug data collections.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.schedule.schedule_to_csv
documentation:
Translate a honeybee schedule or data collection into a CSV for annual daylight.

Args:
    value: An annual occupancy schedule, either as a path to a csv file,
        a Ladybug Hourly Continuous Data Collection or a HB-Energy
        schedule object. This can also be the identifier of a schedule in
        your HB-Energy schedule library. Any value in this schedule that is
        0.1 or above will be considered occupied.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a CSV of an annual schedule file. Values are 0-1 separated
        by new line.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.schedule.data_to_csv
documentation:
Translate a data collection into a CSV.

Args:
    value: An occupancy schedule, either as a path to a csv file,
        a Ladybug Hourly Data Collection.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a CSV of an annual schedule file. Values are 0-1 separated
        by new line.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.emissions
documentation: Handlers to convert different emissions inputs to values.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.emissions.location_to_electricity_emissions
documentation:
Translate a Location object in the US into electricity carbon emissions.

Args:
    value: Either a ladybug Location object in the USA, which will be used to 
        determine the subregion of the electrical grid or a number
        for the electric grid carbon emissions in kg CO2/MWh.

Returns:
    float -- electricity emissions in kg CO2/MWh.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation
documentation: Handlers for honeybee simulation parameters.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation.energy_sim_par_to_json
documentation:
Translate a honeybee-energy SimulationParameter to a JSON file.

Args:
    sim_par_obj: Either a honeybee-energy SimulationParameter or the path
        to the JSON file. In case the sim_par_obj is a path, it will be
        returned as is. For an object it will be saved to a HBJSON file
        in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to HBJSON file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation.measures_to_folder
documentation:
Translate a list of honeybee-energy Measures to a folder.

Args:
    measures_obj: Either a list of honeybee-energy Measure objects or
        the path to a folder that contains the measures and a .osw with
        the measure arguments. In case the measures_obj is a folder, it will be
        returned as is. For a list of objects it will be saved to an OSW file
        in a temp folder.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a measures folder.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation.list_to_additional_strings
documentation:
Translate a list of additional strings into a single string.

Args:
    additional_strings: Either a single string or a list of strings to be
        joined into one.

Returns:
    str -- A single IDF string.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation.list_to_additional_idf
documentation:
Translate a list of additional strings into a single IDF file.

Args:
    additional_strings: Either a single string or a list of strings to be
        written into an IDF file.

Returns:
    str -- Path to an IDF file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation.viz_variables_to_string
documentation:
Translate a list of visualization variables into a single string.

Args:
    viz_variables: Either a single string or a list of strings to be
        joined into one.

Returns:
    str -- A single IDF string.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.simulation.standard_to_str
documentation:
Translate a different text inputs into an acceptable standard/vintage.

Args:
    standard_str: A string referencing a standard or building vintage
        to be used.

Returns:
    str -- A string that correctly references the standard in honeybee-schema.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.wea
documentation: Handlers for wea file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.wea.wea_handler
documentation:
Translate a Wea object to a wea file.

Args:
    wea_obj: Either a Wea python object or the path to a wea or an epw file.
        In case the wea_obj is a path to wea file it will be returned as is.
        For epw files they will be converted to an annual wea.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a wea file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.wea.wea_handler_timestep_check
documentation:
Translate a Wea object to a wea file while checking to be sure the timestep is 1.

Args:
    wea_obj: Either a Wea python object or the path to a wea or an epw file.
        In case the wea_obj is a path to wea file it will be returned as is.
        For epw files they will be converted to an annual wea.

Returns:
    str -- Path to a wea file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.inputs.wea._wea_file_name
documentation: Generate a file name from a Wea object.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.helper.read_sensor_grid_result
documentation:
Read results from files that align with sensor grids.

Args:
    result_folder: Path to the folder containing the results.
    extension: Text for the file extension to be read (eg. res).
    grid_key: Text for the key in the grids_info.json that identifies the
        file name of each sensor grid. It is either identifier or full_id.
    is_percent: Boolean to note if the values are intended to be percent, in
        which case a check will be done to ensure no value is greater than
        one hundred.
    factor: An optional number to be multiplied by all of the results.
        This can be used to perform unit conversions or change fractional values
        to percentages. (Default: 1)

Returns:
    A matrix with each sub-list containing the values for each of the sensor grids.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.helper.read_grid_results
documentation:
Read results from files that align with sensor grids.

This function should be used if the there is only one value per grid.

Args:
    result_folder: Path to the folder containing the results.
    extension: Text for the file extension to be read (eg. res).
    grid_key: Text for the key in the grids_info.json that identifies the
        file name of each sensor grid. It is either identifier or full_id.
    is_percent: Boolean to note if the values are intended to be percent, in
        which case a check will be done to ensure no value is greater than
        one hundred.
    factor: An optional number to be multiplied by all of the results.
        This can be used to perform unit conversions or change fractional values
        to percentages. (Default: 1)

Returns:
    A list containing the value for each of the sensor grids.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.eui
documentation: Handlers for the eui.json object output by annual energy use runs.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.eui.eui_json_from_path
documentation: Read the energy use values from the eui.json file.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.summary
documentation: Handlers for the summary .json objects and folder contents.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.summary.json_properties_from_path
documentation: Read the properties from a summary json file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.summary.contents_from_folder
documentation: Read the contents of all files in a folder.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.comfort
documentation: Handlers for comfort mapping simulation.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.comfort.read_comfort_percent_from_folder
documentation:
Read comfort percent values from a folder with .csv result files.

The result with be a matrix with each sub-list containing the percent
values for each of the sensor grids.

modules.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight
documentation: Handlers for daylight simulation.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_df_from_folder
documentation: Read daylight factor values from a folder with radiance .res result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_pit_from_folder
documentation: Read point-in-time results from a folder with radiance .res result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_da_from_folder
documentation: Read daylight autonomy values from a folder with radiance .da result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_cda_from_folder
documentation: Read continuous daylight autonomy values from a folder with .cda result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_udi_from_folder
documentation: Read useful daylight illuminance from a folder with radiance .udi result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_ga_from_folder
documentation: Read glare autonomy values from a folder with radiance .da result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_hours_from_folder
documentation: Read hours from a folder with radiance .res result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_ase_from_folder
documentation: Read annual sunlight exposure values from a folder with radiance .ase result files.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.sort_ill_from_folder
documentation: Sort the .ill files from an annual study so that they align with Model grids.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_images_from_folder
documentation: Read hdr images from a folder in a manner that aligns with Model views.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.ill_credit_json_from_path
documentation: Read the credit summary values from the credit_summary.json file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_leed_summary_grid
documentation: Read the grid summary values from the summary_grid.json file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_leed_datacollection_from_folder
documentation: Read LEED Daylight Option I datacollections

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_leed_shade_transmittance_schedule
documentation: Read LEED Daylight Option I shade transmittance schedule.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_grid_metrics
documentation: Read the grid metrics summary file.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_json_dict
documentation: Read a JSON dict.

functions.name: pollination_handlers.outputs.daylight.read_json_summary_list
documentation: Read a JSON list of summaries (dicts).
